message:
fix(upgrade,init): improve archive-tar error message and expand init .gitignore

Issue #170: When `br upgrade` fails with "archive-tar not supported"
(affecting users on pre-fix binaries like v0.1.21), the error now includes
a clear message directing them to use the curl|bash installer as a
one-time manual upgrade path. Future versions already include archive-tar
support, so this only affects users upgrading from old builds.

Issue #167: The .gitignore template created by `br init` was missing
.br_history/ and several other entries that the repo's own .beads/.gitignore
already includes (sync state files, merge artifacts, daemon runtime files,
worktree redirects, bv lock file). New repos now get a complete .gitignore
from the start.

Closes #167, closes #170

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -108,6 +108,34 @@ pub fn execute(
 # Temporary
 last-touched
 *.tmp
+
+# Local history backups
+.br_history/
+
+# Sync state (local-only, per-machine)
+.sync.lock
+sync_base.jsonl
+
+# Merge artifacts (temporary files from 3-way merge)
+beads.base.jsonl
+beads.base.meta.json
+beads.left.jsonl
+beads.left.meta.json
+beads.right.jsonl
+beads.right.meta.json
+
+# Daemon runtime files
+daemon.lock
+daemon.log
+daemon.pid
+bd.sock
+sync-state.json
+
+# Worktree redirect file
+redirect
+
+# bv (beads viewer) lock file
+.bv.lock
 ";
         fs::write(gitignore_path, gitignore)?;
     }
